idea-plugin.name: Ayu Islands
idea-plugin.description:
Warm, refined color themes for JetBrains IDEs — three Ayu palettes with modern Islands UI. Free themes with optional premium accent and glow customization.

Free Features

  • 6 themes — Ayu Mirage, Ayu Dark, and Ayu Light, each in classic and Islands UI variants
  • 20+ language highlights — Java, C#/.NET, Rust, Go, Python, JS/TS, HCL/Terraform, Kotlin, Scala, Dart, Ruby, PHP, HTML/CSS, SQL, Bash, YAML, JSON, XML, Markdown
  • Islands UI — rounded panels, island gaps, and compact mode support
  • Canonical ayu-colors — syntax palettes from ayu-theme/ayu-colors
  • Full VCS integration — tuned diff gutters, file status colors, and 16-color terminal palette
  • Accent color customization — 10 hand-picked Ayu palette presets with per-variant storage and live visual preview

Premium Features

  • Per-element accent toggles — fine-grained control over tabs, scrollbars, links, caret row, and more
  • Neon glow effects — island borders, active tabs, and focused inputs with 3 glow styles (Soft, Sharp Neon, Pulse animation)
  • Conflict detection — automatic detection and override for third-party plugin conflicts (Atom Material Icons, CodeGlance Pro)

Settings panel under Appearance > Ayu Islands with tabbed Accent/Effects layout.

Verified on 12 IDEs — IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, RustRover, Rider, PhpStorm, CLion, DataGrip, RubyMine
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2.1.0

  • [Paid] Indent Rainbow integration: accent-colored indent guides with 4 intensity presets
  • [Paid] Bracket scope gutter highlight for matched braces
  • [Free] Accent-colored matched bracket styling
  • [Free] New Integrations settings panel for third-party plugin sync

2.0.1

  • Fix crash on theme switch (null attributes in editor scheme revert)
  • Fix crash on theme switch (premature repaint before new theme loaded)
  • Replace deprecated platform API calls for Marketplace compatibility

2.0.0

  • Accent color customization: 10 Ayu palette presets with per-element toggles and visual preview (premium)
  • Neon glow effects: island borders, active tabs, and focused inputs with 3 glow styles (premium)
  • Per-variant accent storage (independent colors for Mirage, Dark, Light)
  • Third-party conflict detection (Atom Material Icons, CodeGlance Pro)
  • Settings panel under Appearance with tabbed Accent/Effects layout
  • Freemium licensing: all 6 base themes remain free

1.2.1

  • Add missing Marketplace changelog for v1.2.0 changes

1.2.0

  • Accent-colored active tab underline, caret, and focus borders for all variants
  • Accent color defaults for editor selections, search highlights, and breadcrumbs
  • Kotlin 2.1.10 JVM toolchain build support

1.1.0

  • C#/.NET syntax highlighting (Rider/ReSharper) for all three variants
  • Dart, Ruby, PHP, Scala, Kotlin, Rust, Bash, SQL, RegExp language-specific highlights
  • 20+ languages with hand-tuned syntax tokens

1.0.3

  • Ayu Dark and Ayu Light variants with canonical ayu-colors palettes
  • Six theme variants total: Mirage, Dark, Light (base + Islands UI each)
  • Git Log contrast and notification border fixes

1.0.0

  • Initial release — Ayu Mirage Islands dark theme
  • Editor color scheme with HCL, Go, Python, JS/TS, Markdown, YAML, JSON support
